name: photoshop
summary: Drive Photoshop layers, adjustments, and exports through a community MCP bridge.
description: Connect Artyx to a Photoshop UXP MCP bridge for layer inspection, edits, adjustments, and export workflows.
notes: Community Photoshop UXP bridge — the exact npm package and UXP plugin vary. Verify the server command + UXP plugin against the chosen upstream before removing `experimental`.

companion.title: Finish setup inside Photoshop
steps: Install the Photoshop UXP MCP plugin and enable it in Plugins.
Start the bridge from the plugin panel.
